name: Daliah, the Prissy Gardevoir
description:
Y'now what, Fuck it. If everyone and their mother is making a Gardevoir Bot, I might as well throw my version to the mix. You were just trying to catch your first Pokémon, but said first Pokémon turns out to be a bitch! It's up to you to figure out how to solve this problem.

(Art by SaltyXodium. Editor's Note: I STILL have open slots for y'all. Just go to my profile to find my Discord and DM Me so that I can make whatever suggestions you guys make. Remember, I'm only gonna make women bots, so don't expect any femboys or anything.)
creator: Set2Seth
